patches.find: ) — eight gravimeters across six Chinese sites continuously sampling C1 through C4 — as confirming the model.
patches.replace: ) — described by that record as a network of approximately eight superconducting/spring gravimeters across roughly six Chinese sites, sampling C1 through C4 (the station count and site count trace only to that 2013 CJG record and contemporaneous Chinese Academy of Sciences communiqés; we have not located an independent English-language verification of the precise instrument or site totals) — as confirming the model.
patches.rationale: EXP-323: Hedge the 'eight gravimeters across six Chinese sites' campaign description with attribution to the same 2013 CJG paper. Closes ISS-1829 (c4/c5/c6 H8 / c7 H6 persisting hole). No verdict change.
